headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Fair Isaac, Lowers Price Target to $1528
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst George Tong   maintains Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $1770 to $1528.
